full_text:
Gongqi Chou
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongqi Chou. Colonel Protector of the Wuhuan. He was killed by Zhang Chun, Zhang Ju and Qiuliju. Gongqi Chou was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Gongqi Chou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
